brief_summary: Two-line diverging chart over the same W22-W29 2026 window: the Cherry MX2A switch tracker score (warm-red/down token) falling from -10 to -50, against the Cherry brand tracker score (coral) climbing from -45 to -24. The lines cross near the chart's midpoint, visualizing the article's central paradox — one switch line dragging the brand down while the parent brand recovers on other news.
